suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Update scrutiny validation/reviewer procedure so Task-spawned reviewers can run in a read-only or auto-approved mode; in this worker environment the reviewer droid still attempts Execute and exits before producing a report unless the validator compensates manually.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: This scrutiny-validator session (worker 5649ab46-fef0-4025-8b62-72d4b5ee6963) spawned scrutiny-feature-reviewer for fix-scanner-persistence-bugs and the subagent exited with "insufficient permission to proceed" immediately after starting. A manual validator review was required to produce the review artifact.
